title: NIT Rourkela Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Junior Research Fellow Posts
description: National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of various Junior Research Fellow Posts. Candidates with B.E/ B.Tech, M.E/ M.Tech in Civil Engineering can grab this chance and apply for the NIT Rourkela Notification 2026 . Here we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by the last date ...
